prestazioni: KF-ZE (2.0L V6 24V) engine swap with a custom-built HKS GT-SS turbo kit featuring a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, HKS 264°/248° camshafts, and a Tomei 4-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold with 3-inch downpipe and custom 2.5-inch dual exhaust system by Fujitsubo Legalis R

Full standalone Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with custom wiring harness by Wireworks, paired with a K-Tuned K-Series MAP sensor and AEM 3.5bar boost sensor for precise KF-ZE tuning, including individual cylinder fuel trims and launch control mapping

Custom reinforced drivetrain with a MazdaSpeed MX-5 (NB) 6-speed transmission swap, OS Giken Super Lock limited-slip differential, and custom driveshafts by Driveshaft Shop with 3.5-inch aluminum shafts and CV joints rated for 500+ lb-ft torque
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Eunos 500-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front bumper lip, and rear diffuser, all painted in Mazda Racing Silver (14K) with matte black accents

Custom 17x9.5 +25 and 17x10.5 +30 Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels in gunmetal finish, wrapped in 225/45R17 and 255/40R17 Yokohama Advan A052 tires, paired with custom bolt-on fender flares to clear the wider track

Full interior overhaul with Bride Euro II reclining bucket seats in black Alcantara with red stitching, custom rear seat delete with aluminum floor panel by Autoexe, and a custom Momo Mod.78 steering wheel with quick-release hub and NRG short shifter
